profile.name: Abhishek Khadekar
profile.tagline: I build scalable, production-grade web applications for fintech and marketplace products.
profile.intro: React · TypeScript · Redux developer with a test-driven mindset and a habit of shipping features end to end.
profile.about:
I'm a front-end developer with 3.5+ years of experience shipping production web apps in the fintech and marketplace space. Day to day I work in React, TypeScript, and Redux, and I'm comfortable across the whole delivery lifecycle — microfrontend architecture, REST API integration, and test-driven development with Jest, Playwright, and Cypress.

I've delivered end-to-end features, resolved live production incidents, and collaborated directly with clients in Agile/Scrum teams. Currently I'm building for Intuit QuickBooks through Persistent Systems.

experience.blurb: Building production front-ends for global fintech and marketplace clients across multiple engagements.

engagements.note: Microfrontend features across 4–8 repos; stabilized Playwright E2E suites; led production incident calls to same-session resolution.
Field validation across KYC/eSignature flows, REST integrations (PAN/Aadhaar), and geolocation-based customization.
Systematic transfer module (adopted as core functionality), a risk-rated fund component, and Redux state for scheme details.
Cypress E2E + Jest to 75%+ coverage, Material UI component system, zero production rollbacks.

experience.blurb: Built a functional Amazon clone in React/TypeScript with unit tests in React Testing Library and Jest.

projects.name: Intuit QuickBooks — Microfrontend Platform
highlights: Developed and maintained features across a microfrontend architecture spanning 4–8 independent repositories with consistent UI behavior.
Refactored Playwright E2E suites to eliminate flaky tests, improving CI/CD reliability across release cycles.
Used observability tooling to catch user-flow anomalies before escalation, and led client-facing incident calls to same-session resolution.

projects.name: HDFC NRI Bank Account Onboarding
highlights: Architected field validation across RM Details, Personal Details, KYC, and eSignature pages.
Integrated REST endpoints for PAN/Aadhaar verification, country lists, and relationship-manager data.
Built a geolocation feature to tailor platform services to the user's region.

projects.name: HDFC Mutual Fund Investment Platform
highlights: Delivered a systematic transfer module enabling automated investments — adopted as core platform functionality.
Built a fund-ratings component with high/moderate/low risk categorization to improve decision UX.
Managed scheme-details state with Redux for predictability and maintainability.

projects.name: Ticketing System Platform
highlights: Resolved critical bugs across multiple release cycles with zero production rollbacks.
Built comprehensive Cypress E2E coverage across all critical ticketing workflows.
Added Jest unit tests to 75%+ coverage and a consistent Material UI component system.

personalProjects.name: Amazon Clone — E-Commerce App
highlights: Full-stack e-commerce clone with product listings, cart, user authentication, and checkout.
Responsive design across all device sizes.
